## Verification

- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm run test`
- [ ] `npm run build`
- [ ] `npm run audit:security`
- [ ] Manual or browser QA completed when the UI changed

## Trust checklist

- [ ] Provenance remains attached to every non-question node
- [ ] Public payloads expose only intended fields
- [ ] Cancellation and terminal lifecycle states remain monotonic
- [ ] No secrets, private workspace data, or generated runtime artifacts are included
